subject: Promote N22 to analyze_subject
description: Port v_n22_n4_quantile_loose_clamp into benchmark_analysis.py as estimate_pia_surface_quantile_ceiling, wire it into analyze_subject with a new "quantile_ceiling" routing case, and change the default method from image_ceiling → quantile_ceiling. Then regenerate hcr_results.csv to confirm no downstream regressions.
